case_title: CASTFIRE, INC. VS. WHAT'S YOUR 2WENTY, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTFIRE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-05-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT KOHLER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NO APPEARANCES AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS TO JAN-15-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
